screen.notes: Agent status; catalog; config; runs; stats.

claim_rows.claim: AETHER_ASYNC_GENERATION is left permanently true in production (async generation is the default path)
claim_rows.method: Trigger a tailor/cover-letter/pipeline run on prod UI; expect HTTP 202 {job_id,status:enqueued}, not a synchronous 200

claim_rows.claim: PUT /api/agents/providers/anthropic/credential (and the per-user PUT /api/agents/user/providers/anthropic/credential) auto-detect and accept two credential formats: a Console API key (sk-ant-api03-...) sent via x-api-key header, OR a Claude Code OAuth token (sk-ant-oat01-...) sent via Authorization: Bearer + anthropic-beta: oauth-2025-04-20 header
claim_rows.method: Submit both credential formats via the agent-config credential UI/API on prod; inspect stored authMode and confirm the correct auth header is used on the subsequent live call

claim_rows.claim: A mismatched or unrecognized Anthropic credential prefix is rejected with HTTP 422 naming both accepted formats (sk-ant-api03-.../sk-ant-oat01-...)
claim_rows.method: Submit a garbage-prefixed credential via the credential UI/API, expect 422 with a message naming both accepted formats

claim_rows.claim: Quota exhaustion never silently falls through to a different billing credential -- an explicit HTTP 429 is raised instead
claim_rows.method: Exhaust or simulate quota exhaustion on a test account and confirm 429 is returned, not a silent billing-credential switch

claim_rows.claim: A live sk-ant-oat01- token round-tripped through a genuine Anthropic API call (HTTP 200), and a live tailor run recorded billingAudit.authMode=oauth_token
claim_rows.method: Re-run the test-connection action for the configured oat01 credential and a tailor run; inspect billingAudit.authMode field on the resulting AgentRun

claim_rows.claim: The in-app interactive "Connect with Anthropic" OAuth-consent flow remains removed and unsupported (only paste-token credential entry exists)
claim_rows.method: Inspect agent-monitor/agents/settings UI for absence of an interactive OAuth-consent button; curl GET/POST /api/agents/auth/anthropic/start expecting 404

claim_rows.claim: POST /api/agents/{tailor,cover-letters}/run and the composite pipeline endpoint return HTTP 202 {"job_id","status":"enqueued"} (async mode); caller polls GET /api/agents/jobs/{job_id} for terminal state
claim_rows.method: Trigger a tailor/cover-letter/pipeline run via prod UI; confirm 202 + job_id in response; poll the jobs endpoint to a terminal state

claim_rows.claim: Quota is reserved atomically at enqueue time (not at execution) and refunded on enqueue failure, worker failure, or a stale-job watchdog trip
claim_rows.method: Check quota/usage counters before and after triggering an async run, including a forced-failure scenario if reproducible; confirm refund on failure

claim_rows.claim: All 27 core Phase-7 gates were VERIFIED-CLOSED including: 0 console errors across 20 routes (GATE-16), 0 same-origin 5xx (GATE-17), backend 676 pytest passed (GATE-19), frontend 297 vitest passed (GATE-20), Playwright E2E green (GATE-21)
claim_rows.method: Playwright console/network sweep across the 20 documented routes on prod; re-run backend pytest / frontend vitest suites (suite-run for counts); manual click-through spot-check for E2E flows

claim_rows.claim: Anthropic OAuth confirmed ToS-prohibited -> platform is API-key-only (ADR-P6-OAUTH); agent config PUT verified; multi-Gmail select_account verified in code
claim_rows.method: Inspect agent-monitor UI for absence of an active interactive Anthropic-OAuth consent flow; PUT/GET a config round-trip; initiate a Gmail connect flow and confirm an account-selection (select_account) prompt appears

claim_rows.claim: All 8 runtime agents (supervisor, scout, matcher, fitScorer, tailor, coverLetter, storyExtractor, emailAgent) are configurable; PUT persists their config (GATE-06)
claim_rows.method: PUT a config change for each of the 8 runtime agents via the agent-monitor UI/API, GET back to confirm persistence

claim_rows.claim: E2E: 17 core screens verified live + cover-503 fixed + mobile-overflow fixed; /pipeline/run is edge-limited (524 @125s) as a documented async residual (BACKLOG-P6-02) as of Phase-6 (GATE-26)
claim_rows.method: Trigger POST /agents/pipeline/run on prod; per later Phase-7 claims (async now permanently on) this residual should be RESOLVED -- confirm no 524 timeout and instead a 202 async response

claim_rows.claim: BACKLOG-P6-01: no per-run Cost column is surfaced in the /dashboard/agents Recent Runs table -- only an aggregate avg-cost stat is shown
claim_rows.method: Inspect the Recent Runs table UI on /dashboard/agents for presence/absence of a per-run Cost column

claim_rows.claim: A Playwright sweep of 14 dashboard routes + /pricing + /admin as a paid admin showed 0 console errors / 0 failed requests / 0 page errors (GATE-03)
claim_rows.method: Playwright sweep of the listed routes on prod, capture console + network errors

claim_rows.claim: GET/POST /api/agents/auth/anthropic/start returns 404 -- the consumer-subscription OAuth start endpoint was removed end-to-end; the x-api-key credential path remains intact
claim_rows.method: curl GET and POST to this path on prod, expect 404

claim_rows.claim: A spend cap of $0 set on a user blocks any agent run before the LLM call is dispatched: the user receives an honest HTTP 429 and their AgentRun count stays at zero
claim_rows.method: Requires admin access: set a $0 spend cap on a test user, trigger an agent run as that user, confirm 429 and AgentRun count unchanged

claim_rows.claim: Quota is reserved atomically before an agent run executes, with refund-on-failure; deterministic agents (scout/fitScorer/matcher/supervisor) are unmetered and do not consume quota
claim_rows.method: Check quota/usage before and after running scout (expect unchanged, unmetered) vs running tailor (expect decremented)

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named agent-monitor or agent-monitor_auth/agent-monitor_unauth or baseline/agent-monitor depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
